# g13d

Nix package for `g13d`, libusb daemon driving Logitech G13 gamepads. `default.nix` wraps upstream C++ source via `stdenv.mkDerivation`; `fix-algorithm-include.patch` repairs a build failure in `g13_stick.cpp` before compilation.

## Contents

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| [default.nix](./default.nix) | `stdenv.mkDerivation` for `pname = "g13"`, `version = "master-2024-12-30"`; applies patch, invokes `cmake`, installs `g13d` binary. |
| [fix-algorithm-include.patch](./fix-algorithm-include.patch) | Single-hunk patch inserting `#include <algorithm>` into `g13_stick.cpp` after `#include "g13.hpp"`. |

## Stack

- **Build system:** `cmake`
- **Runtime deps:** `libusb1`, `libevdev`, `log4cpp`
- **Test dep:** `gtest`
- **Entry point:** `$out/bin/g13d`; `mainProgram = "g13"`

## Configuration

- Pinned commit: `acea10b7ae7b673a0b41545c71084c9b9b63d1d7`
- License field unresolved — `licenses.unfree` commented with `# FIXME`
- NixOS module counterpart: [modules/g13d/](../../modules/g13d/)

## Behavioral Contracts

Patch applies to exact line context:
```
 #include "g13.hpp"
+#include <algorithm>
```
Target file: `g13_stick.cpp` line 4, `namespace G13` scope. Patch fails if upstream reorders includes.
